title: India's Coal-Derived Electricity Generation Sets Another Record as Predicted
section_path: India's Coal-Derived Electricity Generation Sets Another Record as Predicted
section_path_text: India's Coal-Derived Electricity Generation Sets Another Record as Predicted
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in our most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report (published before the start of every week), India produced approximately 135.8 billion kilowatt hours of electricity last month. This is up month-on-month by 6.3 billion kilowatt hours (5%) and up year-on-year by 12.1 billion kilowatt hours (10%). India's electricity output has remained strong as anticipated and has now increased on a year-on-year basis for twelve straight months.
